title: Carl XVI Gustaf of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Carl XVI Gustaf is King of Sweden, reigning since 1973.

title: Charles XIV John of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Charles XIV John was King of Sweden and Norway from 1818 until his death in 1844 and the first monarch of the Bernadotte dynasty.

title: Carl XII of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Charles XII, sometimes Carl XII or Carolus Rex, was King of Sweden from 1697 to 1718.

title: Gustavus Adolphus of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustavus Adolphus, also known in English as Gustav II Adolf or Gustav II Adolph, was King of Sweden from 1611 to 1632.

title: Christina of Sweden becomes Queen of Sweden
fact: Christina, a member of the House of Vasa, was Queen of Sweden from 1632 until her abdication in 1654.

title: Gustaf VI Adolf of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustaf VI Adolf was King of Sweden from 29 October 1950 until his death in 1973.

title: Oscar I of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Oscar I was King of Sweden and Norway from 8 March 1844 until his death.

title: Gustav III of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustav III, also called Gustavus III, was King of Sweden from 1771 until his assassination in 1792.

title: Margaret I of Denmark becomes Queen of Sweden
fact: Margaret I was queen regnant of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden from the late 1380s until her death, and the founder of the Kalmar Union that joined the Scandinavian kingdoms together for over a century.

title: Gustaf V of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustaf V was King of Sweden from 8 December 1907 until his death in 1950.

title: Sigismund III Vasa becomes King of Sweden
fact: Sigismund III Vasa was King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania from 1587 to 1632 and, as Sigismund, King of Sweden from 1592 to 1599.

title: Oscar II of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Oscar II was King of Sweden from 1872 until his death in 1907 and King of Norway from 1872 to 1905.

title: Gustav IV Adolf of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustav IV Adolf or Gustav IV Adolph was King of Sweden from 1792 until he was deposed in a coup in 1809.

title: Christian II of Denmark becomes King of Sweden
fact: Christian II, a monarch under the Kalmar Union, reigned as King of Denmark and Norway from 1513 until 1523.

title: Adolf Fredrik of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Adolf Frederick was King of Sweden from 1751 until his death in 1771.

title: Charles XIII of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Charles XIII or Carl XIII was King of Sweden from 1809 and King of Norway from 1814 to his death.

title: Christian I of Denmark becomes King of Sweden
fact: Christian I (Christiern I) was a German noble and Scandinavian monarch under the Kalmar Union.

title: Frederick I of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Frederick I was King of Sweden from 1720 until his death, having been prince consort of Sweden from 1718 to 1720, and was also Landgrave of Hesse-Kassel from 1730.

title: Gustav I of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Gustav Eriksson Vasa, also known as Gustav I, was King of Sweden from 1523 until his death in 1560.

title: Charles IX of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Charles IX, also Carl, reigned as King of Sweden from 1604 until 1611.

title: Carl XV of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Charles XV and IV was King of Sweden and King of Norway, there often referred to as Charles IV, from 8 July 1859 until his death in 1872.

title: Ulrika Eleonora I of Sweden becomes Queen of Sweden
fact: Ulrika Eleonora or Ulrica Eleanor, also known as Ulrika Eleonora the Younger, was Queen of Sweden from 5 December 1718 until her abdication on 29 February 1720 in favour of Frederick, her husband.

title: Olof Skötkonung becomes King of Sweden
fact: Olof Skötkonung, sometimes stylized as Olaf the Swede, was King of Sweden, son of Eric the Victorious and, according to Icelandic sources, Sigrid the Haughty.

title: Eric the Victorious becomes King of Sweden
fact: Eric the Victorious was a Swedish monarch as of around 970.

title: Christopher of Bavaria becomes King of Sweden
fact: Christopher of Bavaria was King of Denmark, Sweden (1441–48) and Norway (1442–48) during the era of the Kalmar Union.

title: Magnus IV of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Magnus Eriksson was King of Sweden from 1319 to 1364, King of Norway as Magnus VII from 1319 to 1355, and ruler of Scania from 1332 to 1360.

title: Albert, King of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Albert, also known as Albert of Mecklenburg, was King of Sweden from 1364 to 1389 and Duke of Mecklenburg-Schwerin from 1384 to 1412.

title: John, King of Denmark becomes King of Sweden
fact: Hans, or sometimes called John was a Scandinavian monarch who ruled under the Kalmar Union.

title: Karl Knutsson becomes King of Sweden
fact: Karl Knutsson Bonde, also known as Charles VIII and called Charles I in Norwegian contexts, was King of Sweden and King of Norway (1449–1450).

title: Haakon VI of Norway becomes King of Sweden
fact: Haakon VI was King of Norway from 1343 until his death and King of Sweden between 1362 and 1364.

title: Birger, King of Sweden becomes King of Sweden
fact: Birger Magnusson was King of Sweden from 1290 until his deposition in 1318.

title: Anund Jacob becomes King of Sweden
fact: Anund Jacob, also Jakob or James, was King of Sweden from 1022 until around 1050.

title: Valdemar becomes King of Sweden
fact: Valdemar Birgersson, also Waldemar, was King of Sweden from 1250 to 1275.
